assertionResults.evidence: test_awq_dual_dispatch.py fails because it creates engine without loading weights, so build_dispatch_cache() returns empty layer cache. The kernel selection code in engine.py (lines 3455-3477) is correct and verified by code inspection: AWQ dual kernel (12 params) is selected when _awq_mode=True and _gemv_int4_dual_awq_fused is available. Kernel loads successfully: 'GEMV INT4 dual AWQ (fused gate+up+silu, no zero-point) loaded'. AWQ mode propagates to all 4 GPUs.

metrics.test_failure_reason: No weights loaded, layer cache empty - test design issue

assertionResults.consoleOutput:
Kernel loading: 'GEMV INT4 dual AWQ (fused gate+up+silu, no zero-point) loaded'
AWQ mode: 'AWQ GEMV mode enabled: using gemv_int4_v5_awq_t16 + gemv_int4_dual_awq_fused (no zero-point)'
Test output: 'FAIL: Layer 0 not in cache' (because no weights loaded)

assertionResults.evidence: test_awq_dual_gemv.py: All throughput benchmarks PASSED. AWQ dual kernel shows 1.026-1.047x speedup over GPTQ dual kernel, exceeding 1.02x target.
assertionResults.consoleOutput:
Throughput Report:
  ✓ N=11008, K= 5120: GPTQ=142.5us, AWQ=139.0us, speedup=1.026x
  ✓ N=13696, K= 5120: GPTQ=167.2us, AWQ=162.5us, speedup=1.029x
  ✓ N=17408, K= 5120: GPTQ=204.3us, AWQ=195.2us, speedup=1.047x

assertionResults.evidence: E2E validation blocked: Model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ is detected as 'gptq' format (has qzeros tensors). Running AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights causes NaN/Inf because AWQ kernel skips zero-point subtraction (assumes zeros=0), but GPTQ weights have non-zero zero points. C dispatch integration code is correct (engine.py lines 3455-3477) but cannot be validated E2E without true AWQ model weights.
assertionResults.consoleOutput:
Model format check: Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros=True, has_qweight=True, has_g_idx=False → detected as GPTQ format
C dispatch integration code verified by code inspection

frictions.description: test_awq_dual_dispatch.py creates engine without loading weights, so layer cache is empty and ffn_gate_up_silu not found
frictions.suggestedFix: Test should either use mock weights or skip layer cache validation when weights not loaded

frictions.description: AWQ model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors, detected as GPTQ format - not true AWQ
frictions.suggestedFix: Download true AWQ model (with qweight/scales but no qzeros) or create synthetic AWQ weights for testing

blockers.description: Model labeled 'AWQ' at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors (GPTQ format). AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights produces NaN/Inf because AWQ kernel skips zero-point subtraction.
blockers.suggestedResolution: Download true AWQ Qwen 3.5 27B model from HuggingFace that has qweight/scales but NO qzeros tensors, or create synthetic AWQ weights for validation.

blockers.description: test_awq_dual_dispatch.py creates engine without loading weights, resulting in empty layer cache and false test failures
blockers.suggestedResolution: Fix test to create mock INT4 weights for layer cache validation, or add flag to skip weight-dependent tests
